label: agentdb • page a result set with limit/offset
query: Your agent database already has a table named numbers with a single INTEGER column n holding the values 1 through 25. Without loading the whole table at once, use db_query's limit and offset to page through it in ascending order and tell me the value of n in the 23rd row.
notes: WS4 proof: exercises the new db_query limit/offset paging. seedSql stages the 25 rows before the run. argsMustContain pins that the model actually used offset rather than slurping the table; the answer (n=23) is only reachable by addressing the 23rd row.
